task: Determine the current UTC time, then research the state of renewable energy adoption globally and provide a summary with key statistics for 2024.

agents.name: TimekeeperAgent
agents.description: Provides current UTC timestamp for report metadata
agents.instructions: Use TimePlugin to get the current UTC time. Return only the timestamp.

agents.name: ResearchAgent
agents.description: Finds and gathers information from various sources
agents.instructions: Find reliable information on renewable energy adoption. Present clearly with citations where possible.

agents.name: AnalystAgent
agents.instructions: Analyze the gathered information and produce a concise, well-structured summary.

settings._note: Magentic ignores plugins/tools in current version (warning logged). Demonstrates JSON shape only.
